their general sale is destined to do
much in the way of adding sinews
of war for the suffrage propaganda.
Also, their use is intended to popu-
larize the movement.


The first issue, an experiment,
was limited to 100000. The
stamps made such a hit, however,
that the issue was exhausted with
in few days Every suffrage or
ganization in the country began
clamoring for them, by telegraph
and by mail The printers are
working overtime now getting out
100000 of them.


The stamp is handsome little
thing, about the size of the govern
ments old special delivery sticker
1t is printed in the same shade oil
deep blue. Around its sides are
ranged the names of the four states
in which women already have votes
Utah, Wyoming, Idaho and Colo
RADIO.
